title: senecio minimus
intro: Senecio minimus, also known as Pyrethrum or Dwarf Fireweed, is a small, daisy-like flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Senecio minimus include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Senecio minimus is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
